meta.description: Quality construction and trade services in Brisbane. Licensed, insured, and trusted.

business.name: Acme Construction
business.description: We are a Brisbane-based construction company delivering quality residential and commercial builds. With over 15 years in the industry, we pride ourselves on transparent pricing, reliable timelines, and craftsmanship that speaks for itself.

hero.headline: Brisbane's Most Trusted Builders
hero.subheadline: Quality construction for residential and commercial projects. On time, on budget, no surprises.

services.headline: What We Do
services.subheadline: End-to-end construction and trade services built around your project.

items.title: New Construction
items.description: Full residential and commercial builds from slab to handover. We manage every trade and keep you updated at every milestone.

items.title: Renovations
items.description: Transform your existing space without the stress. We handle council approvals, scheduling, and quality control end-to-end.

items.title: Project Management
items.description: Already have a team but need a reliable site manager? We coordinate trades, manage timelines, and keep your build moving.

items.title: Maintenance & Repairs
items.description: Fast, reliable maintenance for residential and commercial properties. No job too small.

about.headline: Who We Are
about.body:
Acme Construction has been building homes and businesses across Brisbane since 2009. We started as a small team with a simple belief: great construction doesn't have to be complicated. Today, we're a team of 12 tradespeople and project managers who still operate by that same principle.

Every project we take on gets our full attention. We don't overbook, we don't cut corners, and we don't disappear after handover. If something isn't right, we fix it — full stop.

highlights.text: Brisbane-based team — we know local conditions

process.headline: How It Works
process.subheadline: A simple, transparent process from first contact to final handover.

steps.title: Get in Touch
steps.description: Tell us about your project — a quick call or message is all it takes. We'll ask the right questions to understand what you need and put together a tailored quote.

steps.title: Quote & Plan
steps.description: We provide a detailed, itemised quote with no surprises. Once you're happy, we lock in a start date and brief you on exactly what to expect.

steps.title: We Build
steps.description: Our team gets to work. You'll receive regular updates and have a direct line to your project manager throughout the build.

steps.title: Handover
steps.description: We do a thorough walkthrough together before signing off. Any snag items are resolved before we consider the job done.

whyUs.headline: Why Choose Us
whyUs.subheadline: What sets us apart from the rest.

items.title: Fixed-Price Quotes
items.description: You'll know exactly what you're paying before we start. We don't add surprise line items halfway through your project.

items.title: Direct Communication
items.description: You deal with the same person from quote to handover. No call centres, no being passed around.

items.title: On-Time Delivery
items.description: We set realistic timelines and stick to them. If something comes up, you hear about it from us first — not last.

items.title: Quality Guaranteed
items.description: All our work is fully warranted. If something isn't right after we finish, we come back and fix it at no cost.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.text: Excellent work from start to finish. They finished on time, communicated well, and the quality was outstanding.

contact.headline: Get a Free Quote
contact.subheadline: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within one business day.
contact.confirmationMessage: Thanks — we'll be in touch within one business day.
